ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "is_toxic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the measurement is toxic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Water source of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "safe_limit" REAL /* Safe limit for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., physical, chemical, biological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toxicity_levels" (
  "toxicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toxicity level */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "toxic_limit" REAL /* Toxic limit for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the toxicity level */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the toxicity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toxicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toxicity_levels_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the water quality data for the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_script" TEXT /* Script or function to validate the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_metadata_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_metadata_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_instrument_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_instrument_assignments_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_instrument_assignments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES measurement_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
